description:
LULC map created based on the availability of the following sorted datasets:
- Habitat (from [Inspire LT](https://www.inspire-geoportal.lt/) )
- Natura2000 sites (from [Inspire LT](https://www.inspire-geoportal.lt/) )
- [Small Woody Features](https://land.copernicus.eu/en/products/high-resolution-layer-small-landscape-features/small-woody-features-2021)
- [CLC+ BackBone ](https://land.copernicus.eu/en/products/clc-backbone/clcplus-backbone-2023-raster-10-m-europe-2-yearly)

[Description of the stack dataset value](https://workspace-ui-public.baltic-gtif.hub-otc.eox.at/api/public/share/public-4wazei3y-02/NCS/stack_vulnerability/LULC/category_for_style.pdf)"
